interpretation: Verifier-first arm, complete 60-unit run. CBMC stayed sound throughout (never a false safe). 0 real bug candidates. Every "unsafe" was a CBMC harness-build failure (no body for callee) from the LLM omitting the function-under-test body; all reclassified to harness-invalid. Inconclusive verdicts are buildable harnesses whose callees were stubbed as externs. extract-failed are functions the regex slicer could not pull. Bottleneck is harness-synthesis quality on a 7B CPU model, not the verifier.
soundness_note: LLM is structurally a proposer; CBMC is the verdict authority. Weak proposer -> no findings, never an unsound pass. Yield levers: clang/libclang extraction, stronger harness-author model, inline real callee bodies instead of extern stubs.
